summary: Parallel review: FAIL (1 critical, 18 warning, 12 suggestion). Compound gate: PASS

findingsList.text: 🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323 — `--no-simplify` test duplicates guard logic inline instead of testing the actual function/integration; refactor resilience is zero. Extract to a test that calls the real conditional.
🟡 bin/lib/outer-loop.mjs — SPEC line 45 requires `--no-simplify` propagation to inner loop; zero matches found. Multi-feature runs cannot disable the simplification pass.
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:188 — `simplifyPass` in STATE.json missing SPEC-required `tokens` field. Token data exists in `state.tokenUsage` but not in `state.simplifyPass` per SPEC line 40.
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:26 — `getFeatureDiff` hardcodes `"main"` with no `master` fallback; repos using `master` silently skip the entire pass. Lost during rewrite; add fallback.

🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:166 — Silent `catch { break; }` on re-verify dispatch failure has no diagnostic logging, unlike the fix dispatch failure at L149 which logs. Asymmetric error handling in the same loop.
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:298 — "fails open when role file is missing" test doesn't actually exercise the error path; it tests the happy path and comments "Since the role file exists in dev env."

- **Prior 🔴 criticals (run_2): both resolved.** Phantom artifact issue no longer relevant (code rewritten, current tests pass). Fix-then-re-verify loop implemented and tested (L134-172, `MAX_FIX_ROUNDS=2`).
🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323 — `--no-simplify` skip test recreates conditional logic inline rather than exercising actual production code; provides weak confidence
🟡 STATE.json:5 — Feature "completed" with 14/15 tasks blocked due to over-decomposition (15 tasks where 4-5 would suffice); wasted ~$50 in redundant review cycles

🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:298 — "fails open when role file is missing" is a **false-positive test**: creates a throwing dispatch, never uses it, and asserts against a working dispatch with the role file present. The catch branch at simplify-pass.mjs:112-115 has zero test coverage. Fix: inject a mechanism to simulate missing role file.

🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323 — "--no-simplify flag" test **re-implements the conditional from run.mjs inline** instead of testing production code. If run.mjs:1507 were refactored, this test would still pass. Fix: replace with integration test that calls production code.

🟡 test/simplify-pass.test.mjs — **Three untested fix-loop branches**: re-verify dispatch failure (L162-168), post-fix diff empty (L155-158), re-verify returns `ok: false` (L164). All silently break the loop but none are exercised by tests.

🟡 tasks/task-1/artifacts/test-output.txt — **Stale artifact from v1** showing tests for `isCodeFile`, `getChangedFiles`, and gate-rerun logic that no longer exists. Handshake claims 601 tests; artifact shows 587 from wrong version.

🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:115 — Fail-open on dispatch failure writes no persistent record; post-hoc audit can't distinguish clean pass from bypassed gate; write a "dispatch failed" entry to `simplify-eval.md`
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:181 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards eval file write errors; log `err.message` before swallowing
🟡 bin/lib/simplify-pass.mjs:198 — Empty `catch {}` silently discards STATE.json write errors; log `err.message` before swallowing
🟡 `test/.test-workspace/features/*/STATE.json` — timestamp-only diff noise from test runs
🟡 `test/simplify-pass.test.mjs:323` — `--no-simplify` test mirrors logic from `run.mjs` rather than exercising actual code
